text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 The Israeli military has released footage showing the killing of a Hezbollah fighter in Bint Jbeil using a FPV drone. Troops of the Egoz commando unit identified and killed a alleged group planning drone attacks on Israeli forces. A short while…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 New footage of the same incident released by the IDF showcasing the FPV drone striking a Hezbollah operative in Bint Jbeil. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列军方发布了视频，显示使用 FPV 无人机在宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）击毙了一名真主党武装人员。Egoz 特种部队的士兵识别并击毙了一个据称计划对以色列军队发动无人机袭击的小组。不久前……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列国防军发布了同一事件的新视频，展示了 FPV 无人机在宾特朱拜勒打击一名真主党武装人员。@wfwitness

text: ✝️ ☪️ One day after Trump publicly attacked him, Pope Leo XIV visited the Grand Mosque in Algiers on his historic visit to Africa. No statement needed. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ✝️ ☪️ 在特朗普公开抨击他一天后，教皇利奥十四世在对非洲的历史性访问中参观了阿尔及尔大清真寺。无需发表声明。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Secretary General Sheikh Naim Qasem: “ You are truly strange! By God, you do not fight, nor do you let anyone else fight; you do not resist, nor do you let anyone else resist. Go and look at the Israeli enemy everyone there is fighting”
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ResistanceTrench 镜像：🇱🇧 真主党秘书长谢赫·纳伊姆·卡西姆：“你们真是奇怪！看在上帝的份上，你们自己不打，也不让别人打；你们不抵抗，也不让别人抵抗。去看看以色列敌人，那里每个人都在战斗。”

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Secretary General Sheikh Naim Qasem: “This negotiation is an act of submission and surrender, and we call for a heroic stance to cancel it. Nations will then come running to you, and you will establish the use of elements of strength to confront the Israeli enemy and force it to implement the agreements”
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ResistanceTrench 镜像：🇱🇧 真主党秘书长谢赫·纳伊姆·卡西姆：“这次谈判是一种屈服和投降的行为，我们呼吁采取英勇的立场取消它。届时各国会奔向你们，你们将建立起利用力量要素来对抗以色列敌人并迫使其执行协议的局面。”

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Secretary General Sheikh Naim Qasem: “ We responded at the appropriate time and found that this was the right moment to proceed with implementing the agreement; it was then discovered that a massive aggressive plan had been prepared for Lebanon. We deprived the enemy of catching us by surprise and inflicting the very heavy losses that could have occurred. The enemy's goals are clear: to destroy the strength that Lebanon possesses as a prelude to "Greater Israel." For the record, all of Lebanon is targeted; when Israel occupies southern Lebanon, it means it is occupying Lebanon, and when it exerts pressure and spreads its killing across Lebanese territories, it means all of Lebanon is targeted. In the event of aggression, the Lebanese state is supposed to resist and task its army and forces to confront the aggression.”
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ResistanceTrench 镜像：🇱🇧 真主党秘书长谢赫·纳伊姆·卡西姆：“我们在适当的时候做出了回应，并发现这是推进执行协议的正确时机；随后发现针对黎巴嫩的巨大侵略计划已经准备就绪。我们使敌人无法对我们进行突袭，并避免了可能发生的非常惨重的损失。敌人的目标很明确：摧毁黎巴嫩拥有的力量，作为‘大以色列’的前奏。郑重声明，整个黎巴嫩都是目标；当以色列占领黎巴嫩南部时，意味着它正在占领黎巴嫩；当它施加压力并在黎巴嫩领土上进行杀戮时，意味着整个黎巴嫩都是目标。在发生侵略的情况下，黎巴嫩国家理应进行抵抗，并派遣其军队和部队对抗侵略。”

text: WarMonitor So when Trump says the war on Iran is won, tankers are rushing to the U.S., and all these other fantasies... is he really seeing this in his head? I mean, if he can't tell the difference between Jesus and a doctor... he's either lying, or just insane. Both are dangerous. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 所以当特朗普说对伊朗的战争已经获胜，油轮正涌向美国，以及所有这些幻想……他脑子里真的看到了这些吗？我的意思是，如果他分不清耶稣和医生……他要么是在撒谎，要么就是疯了。两者都很危险。推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah leader Qassem: “We’ve chosen to fight to protect Lebanon.” He rejects U.S.-hosted talks with Israel, framing it as a binary choice: fight or surrender. “Surrender is not an option. Whoever wants it can do so alone.” He claims Hezbollah fighters are active across the battlefield, fighting “with the spirit of martyrs” and “to the death and victory,” invoking Karbala. Qassem adds that militants will capture Israeli soldiers “when the opportunity arises,” and says Hezbollah is striking from multiple directions, using mobile, hit and run tactics to block any IDF foothold. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 真主党领导人卡西姆：“我们选择战斗以保护黎巴嫩。”他拒绝了美国主办的与以色列的会谈，将其定性为二选一：战斗或投降。“投降不是一个选项。谁想要投降，谁就自己去。”他声称真主党武装人员活跃在整个战场，以“烈士精神”战斗，“至死方休，直至胜利”，并援引了卡尔巴拉（Karbala）。卡西姆补充说，武装分子将在“机会出现时”俘虏以色列士兵，并表示真主党正从多个方向进行打击，使用机动、打了就跑的战术来阻止以色列国防军站稳脚跟。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @Etienne_Marcuz : 🇷🇺 🚀 Meanwhile, somewhere in Russia near Kazakhstan's border... 🚀 🇷🇺 SARMAT is trying again. The first two NOTAMs are identical to the ones broadcasted in November 2025, while the one over Kura test range is slightly different, so maybe different payloads and/or deployment strategy by the bus. The new testing period is between tomorrow and Friday. Following last November's major failure we published a @FRS_org with Christian Maire explaining why the R-36M2 and AVANGARD hypothesis was very unlikely, leaving SARMAT as the best candidate (link ⬇️ ). Will our big fella go a bit further this time...? https://www.frstrategie.org/en/publications/notes/analysis-and-possible-consequences-failure-russian-icbm-flight-28-november-2025-2026 cc @KomissarWhipla @krakek1 @The_Lookout_N @nukestrat @La_souris_DA @MatejRisko @Strike_Flanker @DDolzikova @russianforces @MeNMyRC1 @NicoleGrajewski tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (War & Military News) 转推 @Etienne_Marcuz ：🇷🇺 🚀 与此同时，在俄罗斯靠近哈萨克斯坦边境的某个地方…… 🚀 🇷🇺 “萨尔马特”（SARMAT）再次尝试。前两个航行通告（NOTAM）与2025年11月广播的相同，而库拉（Kura）试验场上空的那个略有不同，所以可能是不同的载荷和/或母舱的部署策略。新的测试期在明天到周五之间。继去年11月的重大失败后，我们发布了一份 @FRS_org 报告，克里斯蒂安·迈尔（Christian Maire）解释了为什么 R-36M2 和“先锋”（AVANGARD）的假设极不可能，这使得“萨尔马特”成为最佳候选者（链接 ⬇️）。我们的大家伙这次会走得更远一点吗……？ https://www.frstrategie.org/en/publications/notes/analysis-and-possible-consequences-failure-russian-icbm-flight-28-november-2025-2026 cc @KomissarWhipla @krakek1 @The_Lookout_N @nukestrat @La_souris_DA @MatejRisko @Strike_Flanker @DDolzikova @russianforces @MeNMyRC1 @NicoleGrajewski 推文

text: Open Source Intel NOW: IRGC spokesman warns Iran will unveil military capabilities the enemy “has no knowledge of” if the war continues. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 快讯：伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队发言人警告称，如果战争继续，伊朗将展示敌人“一无所知”的军事能力。推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW: AP: Hezbollah says the group will not abide by any agreements reached in U.S.-brokered Lebanon-Israel talks. Hezbollah’s Qassem in his speech: Lebanese government diplomacy "did not lead to anything." Claims Hezbollah's intervention in the war prevented a surprise Israeli attack on Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043746657976602892/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet

text: Visioner RT @LIGHTNING5T : 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 On the Vovchansk direction, the Armed Forces of Ukraine liberated Vilcha. https://twitter.com/LIGHTNING5T/status/2043757131107590252/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @LIGHTNING5T ：🇺🇦 🇷🇺 在沃夫昌斯克（Vovchansk）方向，乌克兰武装部队解放了维尔查（Vilcha）。https://twitter.com/LIGHTNING5T/status/2043757131107590252/photo/1 推文

text: Faytuks News RT @MarineTraffic : Two tankers turn away from Strait of Hormuz after US blockade begins At least two tankers reversed course near the Strait of Hormuz shortly after the start of the US blockade, highlighting the immediate impact on vessel movements. According to #MarineTraffic data, the 188-metre tanker Rich Starry turned back within minutes of approaching the chokepoint. The vessel had departed Sharjah Anchorage on 13 April and was sailing laden, with a reported draught of 11.3 metres, while signalling China as its destination. A second vessel, the 175-metre tanker Ostria, also reversed course after approaching the Strait. tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 转推 @MarineTraffic ：在美国封锁开始后，两艘油轮从霍尔木兹海峡掉头。在美国封锁开始后不久，至少有两艘油轮在霍尔木兹海峡附近改变航向，凸显了对船只航行的直接影响。根据 #MarineTraffic 数据，188米长的油轮“Rich Starry”号在接近咽喉要道几分钟内就掉头了。该船于4月13日离开沙迦锚地，满载航行，据报吃水深度为11.3米，目的地显示为中国。第二艘船，175米长的油轮“Ostria”号，在接近海峡后也改变了航向。推文

text: WarMonitor He went through the trouble of editing it to show what appeared to be a demon, or something... definitely not a nurse. Trump now claims he “didn’t realize” he was posting a photo of himself as Jesus Christ surrounded by angels to his Truth Social platform and instead thought he was simply posting a photo of himself as “a doctor.” 😂 🤣 😂 🤣 😂 🤣 👌 Sounds legit. https://twitter.com/ImBreckWorsham/status/2043742885019812218/video/1 - ThePatrioticBlonde 🇺🇸 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 他费尽心思编辑它，展示了一个看起来像恶魔的东西，或者别的什么……绝对不是护士。特朗普现在声称他“没有意识到”自己是在“真实社交”（Truth Social）平台上发布了一张自己作为耶稣基督被天使环绕的照片，反而以为自己只是发布了一张“医生”的照片。😂 🤣 😂 🤣 😂 🤣 👌 听起来很合理。https://twitter.com/ImBreckWorsham/status/2043742885019812218/video/1 - ThePatrioticBlonde 🇺🇸 推文

text: 🇮🇷 🇪🇺 🇺🇦 The EU has set 27 conditions for Hungary’s new prime minister to unlock €35 billion in frozen funds, — FT ➡️ Key demands include approving a €90 billion loan for Ukraine and lifting Hungary’s veto on sanctions against Moscow. ➡️ The European Commission also expects rapid talks with Magyar over migration laws, which have already cost Hungary €1 million per day in fines. ➡️ Under Hungary’s constitution, the president has 30 days to swear in a new parliament. EU officials fear Viktor Orbán could use that window to push legal or personnel changes that could hinder compliance with Brussels’ demands. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇪🇺 🇺🇦 据《金融时报》报道，欧盟为匈牙利新总理设定了27项条件，以解冻350亿欧元的资金。➡️ 主要要求包括批准向乌克兰提供900亿欧元的贷款，并解除匈牙利对针对莫斯科制裁的否决权。➡️ 欧盟委员会还希望与马扎尔（Magyar）就移民法进行快速谈判，这些法律已经让匈牙利每天损失100万欧元的罚款。➡️ 根据匈牙利宪法，总统有30天的时间让新议会宣誓就职。欧盟官员担心维克多·欧尔班（Viktor Orbán）可能会利用这一窗口期推动法律或人事变动，从而阻碍对布鲁塞尔要求的遵守。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇰🇼 Hezbollah Secretary General on the alleged Terrorist cells found in Kuwait: "The Kuwaiti repeats the matter again, and here in Lebanon they denounce the fact that Hezbollah is carrying out this act" @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇰🇼 🇦🇪 Hezbollah Secretary General on the alleged Terrorist cells found in Kuwait and in the UAE: "Where is the evidence? There is no evidence at all. We do not have any parties or forces spread in the region or in the world." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇰🇼 真主党秘书长关于在科威特发现的所谓恐怖分子小组：‘科威特人再次重复这个问题，而在黎巴嫩，他们谴责真主党正在实施这一行为。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇰🇼 🇦🇪 真主党秘书长关于在科威特和阿联酋发现的所谓恐怖分子小组：‘证据在哪里？根本没有证据。我们在该地区或世界上没有任何政党或部队。’ @wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 Péter Magyar says he will push a constitutional amendment to impose a two-term limit on Hungary’s prime minister. If adopted, the rule would block Viktor Orbán ever from returning to office. The proposal still requires approval through a constitutional vote. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）表示，他将推动一项宪法修正案，对匈牙利总理实施两届任期限制。如果获得通过，该规则将阻止维克多·欧尔班再次重返办公室。该提案仍需通过宪法投票批准。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇰🇼 Hezbollah Secretary General on the alleged Terrorist cells found in Kuwait: "We deny that we have anything to do with what is happening in Kuwait, and there is no Hezbollah cell and all the accusations that are being raised are not true." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇰🇼 Hezbollah Secretary General on the alleged Terrorist cells found in Kuwait: "The Kuwaiti repeats the matter again, and here in Lebanon they denounce the fact that Hezbollah is carrying out this act" @wfwitness

My brother, if any country in the world wants to support us, we say to them, Welcome” @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇰🇼 Hezbollah Secretary General on the alleged Terrorist cells found in Kuwait: "We deny that we have anything to do with what is happening in Kuwait, and there is no Hezbollah cell and all the accusations that are being raised are not true." @wfwitness

text: 🇪🇸 🇻🇦 🇺🇸 Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez on Trump's insult to the Pope: While some in the world are sowing the seeds of war, Pope Leo XIV is sowing the seeds of peace with courage and audacity. It will be an honor to meet him in Spain in a few weeks.
text_zh: 🇪🇸 🇻🇦 🇺🇸 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯（Pedro Sanchez）就特朗普对教皇的侮辱发表评论：当世界上有些人正在播下战争的种子时，教皇利奥十四世正以勇气和胆识播下和平的种子。几周后在西班牙见到他将是我的荣幸。

text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：‘我们在黎巴嫩损失惨重。诚然，作为抵抗力量和黎巴嫩人民，损失是巨大的，但这些损失是由于占领造成的。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：‘你知道吗，在六十天协议之后，该协议说以色列敌人将离开黎巴嫩，他们造成的破坏程度是66天战争本身的两倍？’ @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 Bloomberg: Chevron Corporation is set to expand its presence in Venezuela, with the government in Caracas preparing to award the company additional oil fields as part of a broader push to revive the country’s energy sector. Chevron, which maintained operations in Venezuela for nearly two decades despite sanctions and instability, is now positioned to benefit from new policies aimed at opening the oil sector to international companies and boosting production. The expansion comes during the Iran war, which has disrupted Middle Eastern supply and driven global energy concerns, increasing the strategic importance of Venezuela’s vast oil reserves. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 彭博社：雪佛龙公司（Chevron Corporation）准备扩大其在委内瑞拉的业务，加拉加斯政府准备授予该公司额外的油田，作为振兴该国能源部门更广泛推动的一部分。雪佛龙尽管面临制裁和不稳定，但在委内瑞拉维持了近二十年的运营，现在正准备从旨在向国际公司开放石油部门并提高产量的新政策中受益。此次扩张正值伊朗战争期间，这场战争扰乱了中东供应并引发了全球能源担忧，增加了委内瑞拉庞大石油储备的战略重要性。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇱🇱🇧⚡️Israel-Lebanon Talks Set to Begin Tomorrow in Washington at 2:00 p.m. GMT — Zionist media confirms first in-person preparatory meeting at U.S. State Department" 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The Meeting That Will Forever Change Lebanon As we approach the conclusion of Hezbollah Secretary General’s address, an indirect warning has been made. This meeting with Israel will only serve as a direct stab in the backs of Hezbollah. Israel’s goal to encircle Hezbollah from all sides is at play. Should this meeting take place, Hezbollah’s rhetoric will change and the attitude and considerations will follow suit. Shame on the Lebanese government who no longer hides behind the cover of seeking “stability”. But directly making itself an outright enemy of all shia and resistance supporting Lebanese citizens. No matter the outcome, Hezbollah will fight until its last breath. For they are the sons of Husayn (as) and students of Karbala. Never to humiliation!
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇮🇱🇱🇧⚡️以色列-黎巴嫩会谈定于明天格林威治标准时间下午2:00在华盛顿开始——犹太复国主义媒体证实了在美国国务院举行的首次面对面筹备会议。” 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 这场将永远改变黎巴嫩的会议。随着真主党秘书长演讲的结束，一个间接的警告已经发出。这次与以色列的会议只会成为对真主党背后的直接刺伤。以色列从四面八方包围真主党的目的正在发挥作用。如果这次会议举行，真主党的言论将会改变，态度和考量也会随之改变。为那些不再躲在寻求“稳定”的幌子下，而是直接使自己成为所有什叶派和支持抵抗的黎巴嫩公民的公开敌人的黎巴嫩政府感到羞耻。无论结果如何，真主党都将战斗到最后一口气。因为他们是侯赛因（Husayn）的子孙和卡尔巴拉的学生。绝不屈辱！

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇦🇫 🇨🇳 Balochistan Liberation Army fighters killed three Pakistan Coast Guard personnel on Sunday in the first-ever attack on one of the maritime authority's patrol boats operating in the Arabian Sea. The banned separatist group Balochistan Liberation Army claimed responsibility for the attack, stating it marks a new development in their military strategy. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇦🇫 🇨🇳 俾路支解放军（Balochistan Liberation Army）武装分子周日杀死了三名巴基斯坦海岸警卫队人员，这是对在阿拉伯海作业的该海事机构巡逻艇的首次袭击。被取缔的分离主义组织俾路支解放军声称对此次袭击负责，称这标志着其军事战略的新发展。 @wfwitness

text: Spot Brent rises to $132.46 and spot Oman rises to $139.08. Actual oil, not paper oil, is currently $130+ per barrel.

text: WarMonitor If that's what he saw, which is BS BTW, he has bigger problems upstairs than I thought. Reporter: Did you post that picture of yourself depicted as Jesus Christ? Trump: It wasn't a depiction. I did post it and I thought it was me as a doctor. And had to do with red cross as a red cross worker, which we support and only the fake news could come up with that one. https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2043731872757493835/video/1 - Acyn tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 如果这就是他看到的，顺便说一句，这纯属胡扯，他脑子里的问题比我想象的要大。记者：你发布了那张你自己被描绘成耶稣基督的照片吗？特朗普：那不是描绘。我确实发布了它，我以为那是作为医生的我。这与红十字会有关，作为一名红十字会工作者，我们支持它，只有假新闻才会想出那种说法。https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2043731872757493835/video/1 - Acyn 推文

It is infected with deep moral weakness and is losing control of its identity.” tweet

Will tackle the (Israeli) aggression” (So far, since Hezbollah entered the war, multiple Hezbollah towns have been taken by the IDF, approximately 1,500 Hezbollah members have been eliminated, and 6,400 Lebanese have been wounded.) tweet

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 Hezbollah chief Naim Qassem calls on the Lebanese government to cancel Tuesday’s meeting with Israeli officials in Washington. Is that a threat? There is a clear risk that Lebanese politicians could be targeted. Hezbollah’s Qassem in his speech: Lebanese government diplomacy "did not lead to anything." Claims Hezbollah's intervention in the war prevented a surprise Israeli attack on Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043746657976602892/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) REPORTER: Bishop Robert Barron says you owe Pope Leo an apology. Will you apologize? US PRESIDENT TRUMP: No, I don't, because Pope Leo said things that are wrong. He was very much against what I'm doing with regard to Iran, and you cannot have a nuclear Iran. Pope Leo would not be happy with the end result. You'd have hundreds of millions of people dead... I think he's very weak on crime. tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (War & Military News) 记者：罗伯特·巴伦主教（Bishop Robert Barron）说你欠教皇利奥一个道歉。你会道歉吗？美国总统特朗普：不，我不会，因为教皇利奥说的话是错误的。他非常反对我关于伊朗所做的事情，你不能拥有一个核伊朗。教皇利奥不会对最终结果感到高兴。你会让数亿人死亡……我认为他在打击犯罪方面非常软弱。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @StatWatch25 : 🚀 🇯🇵 🇺🇸 Japan will conduct the first combat test of the Tomahawk missile from a destroyer This summer, the Japanese Navy plans to conduct the first training and combat launch of the Tomahawk cruise missile from the destroyer JS Chokai (DDG-176)in the eastern part of the Pacific Ocean with the support of the US Navy's 3rd Fleet. The event will be a key stage in Japan's transition to the concept of counterstrike and expanding its capabilities for long-range high-precision strikes. 🔷 The test will follow the delivery of the first batch of Tomahawk missiles in March, confirmed by Defense Minister S. Koizumi. The Atago-class destroyer JS Chokai has undergone modernization, including the adaptation of Mk.41 vertical launch systems (VLS), the upgrade of the combat information system, and integration with American targeting networks. The Tomahawk cruise missile (BGM-109 Tomahawk) has a range of over 1000–1300 km and is equipped with a warhead weighing about 450 kg, enabling high-precision strikes on protected targets. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 转推 @StatWatch25 ：🚀 🇯🇵 🇺🇸 日本将从驱逐舰上进行战斧导弹的首次实战测试。今年夏天，日本海军计划在美军第三舰队的支持下，在太平洋东部从“鸟海”号驱逐舰（JS Chokai, DDG-176）上进行战斧巡航导弹的首次训练和实战发射。此次活动将是日本向反击概念转型并扩大其远程高精度打击能力的关键阶段。🔷 此次测试将继3月份交付首批战斧导弹之后进行，国防大臣小泉（S. Koizumi）已证实。爱宕级驱逐舰“鸟海”号已经过现代化改造，包括适配 Mk.41 垂直发射系统（VLS）、升级作战信息系统以及与美国目标网络集成。战斧巡航导弹（BGM-109 Tomahawk）射程超过1000–1300公里，配备约450公斤的弹头，能够对受保护目标进行高精度打击。推文

text: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Secretary General Sheikh Naim Qasem: “ You are truly strange! By God, you do not fight, nor do you let anyone else fight; you do not resist, nor do you let anyone else resist. Go and look at the Israeli enemy everyone there is fighting”
text_zh: 🇱🇧 真主党秘书长谢赫·纳伊姆·卡西姆：“你们真是奇怪！看在上帝的份上，你们自己不打，也不让别人打；你们不抵抗，也不让别人抵抗。去看看以色列敌人，那里每个人都在战斗。”

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: "We won't let him settle. The resistance will live with terror, with its capabilities and methods, and it is not just a zero-sum engagement. Not just fighting on the border. It is a flying missile and all…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: "The Israeli settlements in northern Palestine will not be safe, and if the Israelis enter any area of ​​Lebanon, they will demolish the homes to become barren land." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：‘我们不会让他安顿下来。抵抗力量将带着恐惧、带着它的能力和方法生活，这不仅仅是一场零和博弈。不仅仅是在边境战斗。它是飞行的导弹和所有……’ ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：‘巴勒斯坦北部的以色列定居点将不再安全，如果以色列人进入黎巴嫩的任何地区，他们将拆毁房屋，使其成为荒地。’ @wfwitness

text: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Secretary General Sheikh Naim Qasem: “This negotiation is an act of submission and surrender, and we call for a heroic stance to cancel it. Nations will then come running to you, and you will establish the use of elements of strength to confront the Israeli enemy and force it to implement the agreements”
text_zh: 🇱🇧 真主党秘书长谢赫·纳伊姆·卡西姆：“这次谈判是一种屈服和投降的行为，我们呼吁采取英勇的立场取消它。届时各国会奔向你们，你们将建立起利用力量要素来对抗以色列敌人并迫使其执行协议的局面。”

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: "We will fight this enemy from behind him, to his right, and to his left. He will not know where the resistance will come from." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: "We won't let him settle. The resistance will live with terror, with its capabilities and methods, and it is not just a zero-sum engagement. Not just fighting on the border. It is a flying missile and all available means. Above all, resistance. Faith, will and ability" @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：‘我们将从背后、右侧和左侧与这个敌人作战。他将不知道抵抗力量会从哪里来。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：‘我们不会让他安顿下来。抵抗力量将带着恐惧、带着它的能力和方法生活，这不仅仅是一场零和博弈。不仅仅是在边境战斗。它是飞行的导弹和所有可用的手段。最重要的是，抵抗。信仰、意志和能力。’ @wfwitness
